title: Authentic Egyptian Ma'amoul
description: Ma'amoul is a classic Middle Eastern shortbread-like cookie filled with dates or nuts. This recipe is an authentic Egyptian take on the traditional cookie.
instructions: Mix the flour, bisquette, cardamom, and salt in a large bowl.
Add the shortening and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes pliable.
Divide the dough into small balls.
Flatten each ball into a disk.
Place a dried date in the center of each disk.
Fold the dough over the date to form a ball.
Brush the tops with water and sprinkle with bisquette.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until lightly golden.
Let cool on a wire rack.
